parameters.text:
=📊 *Daily Lead Report* – {{ $json["today"] }}

📦 *Overview*
• Total Leads: *{{ $json["totalLeads"] }}*
• Contacted: *{{ $json["status"] }}*
• Retarget 1 Sent: *{{ $json["retarget1"] }}*
• Retarget 2 Sent: *{{ $json["retarget2"] }}*

💬 *Engagement Summary*
• Hot Leads: *{{ $json["hotLeads"] }}*
• Interested: *{{ $json["interested"] }}*
• Not Interested: *{{ $json["notInterested"] }}*

📧 *Email Health*
• Verified Emails: *{{ $json["contactsWithVerification"] }}*
• Reachable Ratio: *{{ $json["reachableRatio"] }}%*
• Unreachable Ratio: *{{ $json["unreachableRatio"] }}%*

🚫 *Unsubscribes*
• Total: *{{ $json["totalUnsubscribed"] }}*
• Today: *{{ $json["unsubToday"] }}*

🗂 *By Source:*
{{ Object.entries($json["sourceCount"] || {}).map(([k,v]) => `• ${k}: ${v}`).join("\n") || "No source data available." }}

🆕 *New Leads Today:*
{{ $json["topList"] || "No new leads today." }}

🔥 *Top Fire Leads:*
{{ $json["fireList"] || "None yet." }}

💎 *Top Hot Leads:*
{{ $json["hotList"] || "None yet." }}

🧹 *Recent Unsubscribes:*
{{ $json["unsubTopList"] || "None today." }}

parameters.content:
## Step 1: **GET DATA** 


-->Gets DATA from all sheets you work with, in this case, 2.

## Step 2:  **GENERATE LEAD REPORT (DAILY)** 


--> Calculates engagement, conversions, deliverability metrics,etc and sends report to slack (Code included).

## DAILY LEAD GENERATION REPORT


## Why?
Manually checking spreadsheets for performance updates wastes time and breaks focus.  

This automation ensures your lead-generation insights come to you; not the other way around.  

By sending a clear, structured daily report straight to Slack (or any other tool you want), it helps you stay proactive, make faster decisions, and maintain full visibility across campaigns without ever opening a sheet.  



Creator: Victordidit
